creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to version 2.14
Add license info while I'm here

Author's changelog:
    Various tray icon-related fixes
    Decode strings to unicode before slicing
    Handle None in replace_from_channel
    Updated French translation
    Remove partial files that are already downloaded completely
    Fix YouTube-related download problems
    Fix typos in gpodder.desktop
    Better GUID tracking with fallback URL

Fix: ==========================
Files added or deleted: None
Minor changes only
==========================
